10: #[derive(Error, Debug)]
11: pub enum WasmPluginError {

41: #[derive(Clone)]
42: struct WasmContext {
43:     memory_limit: u64,
44:     memory_used: Arc<Mutex<u64>>,
45:     error: Arc<Mutex<Option<String>>>,
46: }
47: 
48: impl WasmPluginInstance {
49:     pub fn from_wasm_bytes(
50:         wasm_bytes: &[u8],
51:         name: &str,
52:         memory_limit_pages: u32,
53:     ) -> Result<Self, WasmPluginError> {
54:         let engine = Engine::default();
55:         let module = Module::new(&engine, wasm_bytes)
56:             .map_err(|e| WasmPluginError::CompileError(e.to_string()))?;
57: 
58:         Ok(Self {
59:             engine,
60:             module,
61:             memory_limit_pages,
62:         })
63:     }
64: }
65: 
66: impl WasmPlugin {
67:     pub fn instantiate(
68:         self,
69:     ) -> Result<Self, WasmPluginError> {
70:         let memory_limit = (self.memory_limit_pages as u64) * 65536;
71: 
72:         let context = WasmContext {
73:             memory_limit,
74:             memory_used: Arc::new(Mutex::new(0)),
75:             error: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
76:         };
77: 
78:         let mut store = Store::new(&self.engine, context);
79: 
80:         let instance = Instance::new(&mut store, &self.module, &[])
81:             .map_err(|e| WasmPluginError::InstantiationError(e.to_string()))?;
82: 
83:         let memory = instance.get_memory(&mut store, "memory")
84:             .ok_or_else(|| WasmPluginError::InstantiationError("No memory export".to_string()))?;
85: 
86:         Ok(Self {
87:             instance,
88:             store,
89:             memory,
90:             name: self.name,
91:             call_count: Mutex::new(0),
92:             memory_used: context.memory_used,
93:             memory_limit,
94:         })
95:     }
96: 
97:     fn alloc(&self, size: u32) -> Result<u32, WasmPluginError> {
98:         let mut used = self.memory_used.lock().unwrap();
99: 
100:         if *used + size as u64 > self.memory_limit {
101:             return Err(WasmPluginError::MemoryLimitExceeded);
102:         }
103: 
104:         let offset = *used;
105:         *used += size as u64;
106: 
107:         Ok(offset)
108:     }
109: 
110:     pub fn init(&self, config_json: &str, api: &CoreHostApi, max_calls: u64) -> Result<WasmPluginCtx, WasmPluginError> {
111:         let mut store = &mut self.store;
112: 
113:         let init_func = match self.instance.get_func(store, "ox_plugin_init") {
114:             Some(f) => f,
115:             None => return Err(WasmPluginError::InitFailed),
116:         };
117: 
118:         let config_offset = self.alloc(config_json.len() as u32 + 1)?;
119: 
120:         let ptr = self.memory.data(&store)[config_offset as usize..].as_ptr() as *mut u8;
121:         unsafe {
122:             std::ptr::copy_nonoverlapping(
123:                 config_json.as_bytes().as_ptr(),
124:                 ptr,
125:                 config_json.len(),
126:             );
127:             std::ptr::write(ptr.add(config_json.len()), 0);
128:         }
129: 
130:         let api_ptr: i32 = 0;
131:         let version: i32 = 3;
132: 
133:         let results = init_func.call(store, &[Val::I32(config_offset as i32), Val::I32(api_ptr), Val::I32(version)])
134:             .map_err(|e| WasmPluginError::Trap(e.to_string()))?;
135: 
136:         let ctx = results[0].i32().unwrap_or(0);
137: 
138:         if ctx == 0 {
139:             return Err(WasmPluginError::InitFailed);
140:         }
141: 
142:         Ok(WasmPluginCtx {
143:             ctx,
144:             plugin: self.clone(),
145:         })
146:     }
147: 
148:     pub fn process(&self, plugin_ctx: i32, task_ctx: i32) -> Result<FlowControl, WasmPluginError> {
149:         let mut store = &mut self.store;
150: 
151:         *self.call_count.lock().unwrap() += 1;
152: 
153:         let func = match self.instance.get_func(store, "ox_plugin_process") {
154:             Some(f) => f,
155:             None => return Ok(FlowControl { code: FLOW_CONTROL_ERROR, payload: std::ptr::null() }),
156:         };
157: 
158:         let results = func.call(store, &[Val::I32(plugin_ctx), Val::I32(task_ctx)])
159:             .map_err(|e| WasmPluginError::Trap(e.to_string()))?;
160: 
161:         let code = results.get(0).and_then(|v| v.i32()).unwrap_or(0);
162: 
163:         Ok(FlowControl {
164:             code: if code == 0 { FLOW_CONTROL_CONTINUE } else if code == 1 { FLOW_CONTROL_END } else { FLOW_CONTROL_ERROR },
165:             payload: std::ptr::null(),
166:         })
167:     }
168: 
169:     pub fn error(&self, plugin_ctx: i32, task_ctx: i32) {
170:         if let Some(func) = self.instance.get_func(&mut self.store, "ox_plugin_error") {
171:             let _ = func.call(&mut self.store, &[Val::I32(plugin_ctx), Val::I32(task_ctx)]);
172:         }
173:     }
174: 
175:     pub fn destroy(&self, plugin_ctx: i32) {
176:         if let Some(func) = self.instance.get_func(&mut self.store, "ox_plugin_destroy") {
177:             let _ = func.call(&mut self.store, &[Val::I32(plugin_ctx)]);
178:         }
179:     }
180: 
181:     pub fn stats(&self) -> WasmPluginStats {
182:         WasmPluginStats {
183:             name: self.name.clone(),
184:             calls: *self.call_count.lock().unwrap(),
185:             memory_used: *self.memory_used.lock().unwrap(),
186:             memory_limit: self.memory_limit,
187:         }
188:     }
189: }
